name: Artichoke Dip
recipeIngredient: 4 pieces bacon, crisply fried and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped artichoke hearts, crisply fried and crumbled bacon, lemon juice, mayonnaise, cayenne pepper, salt, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl.
2. Mix until well combined.
3. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
4. Serve with crackers.
